version_description: Fixed a few incorrect chords and improved formatting.

versions.version_description: Correct placing of chords and uses the correct A#dim chord where others just used an A7.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[intro]

[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]

[verse]

N.C.
Somebody's gonna hurt someone before the night is through
N.C.
Somebody's gonna come undone - there's nothin' we can do.
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody wants to touch somebody if it takes all night.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Everybody wants to take a little chance, make it come out right.[/tab]

[chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]C7[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight, I know.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C7[/ch]                                       [ch]A[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
Lord, I know.[/tab]

[verse]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
Some people like to stay out late, some folks can't hold out that long[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]D[/ch]
But nobody wants to go home now, there's too much goin' on.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Em[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                         [ch]Em[/ch]
This night is gonna last forever, last all, last all summer long.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Some time before the sun comes up the radio is gonna play that song.[/tab]

[chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]C7[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight, I know.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C7[/ch]                                       [ch]A[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]
Lord, I know. [/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]G7[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, the moon's shinin' bright[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]                       [ch]C#dim7[/ch]
so turn out the light, and we'll get it right.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D7[/ch]                  [ch]G[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]

(Heartache baby) 

[solo]

[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]G[/ch]  x4  under SLIDE SOLO

[verse]

N.C.
Somebody's gonna hurt someone (somebody) before the night is through
N.C.
Somebody's gonna come undone - there's nothin' we can do. (Everybody)
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]Em[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Everybody wants to touch somebody if it takes all night.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]D[/ch]
Everybody wants to take a little chance, make it come out right.[/tab]

[chorus]
[tab]                   [ch]C7[/ch]                                        [ch]G[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight, I know.[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]C7[/ch]                                       [ch]A[/ch]
There's gonna be a heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
Lets go.[/tab]

[outro]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]G7[/ch]
We can beat around the bushes we can get down to the bone[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]C#dim7[/ch]
We can leave it in the parkin' lot, but either way, there's gonna be a[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
heartache tonight, a heartache tonight I know. (I know)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]                   [ch]G[/ch]
There'll be a heartache tonight a heartache tonight I know.[/tab]

[outro]
[ch]Bb[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]  4x
